subject: docs(implementations): add EVENT_BUS.md pattern doc
body:
New implementation pattern: typed pub/sub event bus factory for service-layer
communication. Sourced from graphiki where it replaces duplicated pub/sub
boilerplate across graph, workspace, and view services.

Key features: generic factory with typed event union, automatic catch-all
"changed" event on every emission, per-listener try/catch error isolation,
Set-based listeners for O(1) removal, and encapsulation pattern (export on,
keep emit private).

Tags: documentation, implementations, event-bus
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-alignment
Semver: minor
